questionHtml: Sketch, on the axes, the variation of the electric potential V with distance between X and Y.
markschemeHtml:
symmetric curve around 0 with potential always positive, “bowl shape up” and curve not touching the horizontal axis. ✓

clear asymptotes at X and Y ✓

meta.title: Sketch, on the axes, the variation of the electric potential V with distance between X and Y.
